meta.title: 16S Ribosomal DNA Analysis of the Genera Micromonospora, Actinoplanes, Catellatospora, Catenuloplanes, Couchioplanes, Dactylosporangium, and Pilimelia and Emendation of the Family Micromonosporaceae
